title: taraxacum laxum
intro: Taraxacum laxum, also known as the upright dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum laxum include supporting digestive health, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum laxum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
